rules: RULE-01: The game starts at scene 'start' with empty clues/beats/logs. Each choice in input.choices is applied in order, up to MAX_STEPS.
RULE-02: A choice valid for the current scene transitions to its target scene and logs '선택:<choiceId>'. An invalid choice is logged '무시:<choiceId>' and changes nothing else.
RULE-03: When the chosen option carries a clue not yet collected, append it to clues and log '단서:<CLUE>'. Clues are unique.
RULE-04: After a clue is collected, re-evaluate beats. Beat DEDUCTION fires once when all three core clues (WOUND, LETTER, PRINT) are held; firing logs 'BEAT:DEDUCTION'.
RULE-05: The 'accuse' choice (verdict) ends the game: end_solved (TRUTH) if all three core clues are held, otherwise end_wrong (COLD_CASE).
RULE-06: Reaching an ending scene sets ending and isGameOver=true; remaining choices are skipped. 'refuse' -> WALKED_AWAY; 'walk' at confront -> COLD_CASE.

RULE-07: FALSE_ALIBI (card 1). crime_scene offers 'question_butler' -> 'butler_room' ('confront_alibi' gives clue ALIBI, 'leave_butler'; both return to crime_scene). Beat FALSE_ALIBI fires once when ALIBI and LETTER are both held; logs 'BEAT:FALSE_ALIBI'. ALIBI is not a core clue.

RULE-08 (THIS CARD): MOTIVE_REVEALED. Add a safe path: crime_scene offers a new choice 'search_safe' -> scene 'safe', which offers 'read_diary' (clue MOTIVE, returns to crime_scene) and 'close_safe' (returns to crime_scene). Beat MOTIVE_REVEALED fires exactly once when both MOTIVE and WOUND are held (the diary's motive plus the wound show premeditation); firing logs 'BEAT:MOTIVE_REVEALED'. MOTIVE is NOT a core clue and does not affect DEDUCTION/verdict. Any play that never searches the safe produces byte-for-byte identical output to before this card.

files.description: Scene graph data (B layer). THIS card adds the 'search_safe' choice to crime_scene and the new 'safe' scene (clue MOTIVE). All existing scenes/choices (including the butler path) kept intact.
Beat-firing logic (A layer). THIS card adds the MOTIVE_REVEALED beat (MOTIVE && WOUND) alongside the existing DEDUCTION and FALSE_ALIBI beats. Keep fireBeats(clues, firedBeats) signature.
